chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No. 818 of 2024 (Sharifullah v. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 08.05.2024 Mr. Saeed ur Rehman, advocate for the applicant Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, Asstt. PG ----------------------------------- It is alleged that the applicant with the rest of the culprits robbed complainant Sharik of his cell phones, for which the present case was registered. The applicant having been refused bail by learned VIIIth- Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi, Malir has sought the same from this Court by way of instant bail application under Section 497 Cr.P.C. Heard arguments and perused the record. The incident took place on 03.01.2024; the FIR whereof has been lodged on 18.02.2024 with a delay of about fifteen days that too on the arrest of the applicant by the police in some other case. No identification parade of the applicant has been conducted through the Magistrate. The cell phone is alleged by the applicant has been foisted upon him by the police. The case has finally been challaned and there is no likelihood of absconsion or tampering with the evidence on the part of the applicant. In these circumstances, a case for the release of the applicant on bail on point of further inquiry is made out. Under the given circumstances, the applicant is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. Instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Nadir
